title: ajania junnanica
intro: Ajania junnanica, also known as Junnan wormwood or Qinghai wormwood, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Ajania junnanica include its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as nausea and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Ajania junnanica can be prepared into various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
